title: Armenia, Türkiye sign deal to restore ancient Silk Road bridge
description: YEREVAN, May 4 (Xinhua) -- Armenia and Türkiye signed a memorandum of understanding (MoU) to jointly restore the historic Ani Bridge, a landmark of the Silk Road on their shared border, during the eighth European Political Community summit in Yerevan, Armenpress reported on Monday.

title: 150-million-year-old soft tissue fossil discovery strengthens Darwin’s theory of evolution
description: 150-million-year-old soft tissue fossil discovery strengthens Darwin’s theory of evolution

title: Amsterdam Gets Rid of Ads for Meat, Fossil Fuels
description: Amsterdam's billboards are going on a low-carbon diet. Since May 1, the Dutch capital has barred outdoor ads for meat, fossil fuels, and high-emission travel, which the BBC reports has eliminated images of burgers and chicken nuggets, diesel vehicles, cruises, and flights from tram shelters, metro stations, and other public...

title: This Souvenir Bowl May Have Commemorated an Ancient Roman Soldier's Service at Hadrian's Wall. It Was Discovered on a Spanish Farm 1,900 Years Later
description: The artifact is decorated with an illustration of the defensive fortification in northern England, but it was unearthed some 1,200 miles away. A new study suggests the design reflects a soldier’s achievements at the site

title: Ancient Builders Mastered Complex Plaster Technique 8,000 Years Before Romans
description: Ancient Builders Mastered Complex Plaster Technique 8,000 Years Before Romans A recent study has revealed that Neolithic builders at the Motza site near Jerusalem mastered a highly complex plaster production technique nearly 8,000 years before the [...]
